meta_title: Official United States Passport Photo Size Maker (51x51 mm) | 2026
meta_description: Create a 100% compliant United States passport or visa photo online. Exact 51x51 mm (2.00x2.00 in) dimensions, required White background. Fast, private browser-side tool.
h1: Official United States Passport Photo Size & Requirements Guide
subtitle: Resize, crop, and compile a printable grid matching official United States biometric passport standards.

tool_workspace.h2: Interactive United States Biometric Cropping Tool
tool_workspace.description: Upload your file to align with the built-in United States dimensions grid. No images are sent to servers; all canvas processing happens locally in JavaScript.

biometric_details.h2: Official Biometric Proportions for United States
biometric_details.head_size_text: The distance from the bottom of your chin to the top of your hair must occupy approximately 56% of the vertical frame height.
biometric_details.eye_height_text: Your eyes must be centered vertically within the target alignment frame bounds.

how_to.title: How to Make and Print a United States Passport Photo
how_to.step1_text: The cropping window scales automatically to the exact 51x51 mm regulation size.
how_to.step2_text: Select your source photo. It stays fully secured within browser execution memory.
how_to.step3_text: Scale and move your image until your face matches the translucent head and eye alignment layers.
how_to.step4_text: Download a single optimized image file or a pre-aligned printable template sheet for standard 4x6 inch photo print layouts.

faq.h2: Frequently Asked Questions about United States Photos
faq.q1: What is the official background color rule for United States?
faq.a1: The government requires a solid, uniform White backdrop with no shadows, objects, or textures present.
faq.q2: Can I wear glasses or headgear in my United States document photo?
faq.a2: Glasses must be removed unless strictly medically necessary (no glare, tint, or thick frames). Religious headwear is permitted provided it reveals the entire oval of the face from chin to forehead.
faq.q3: How do I print my generated digital United States file?
faq.a3: Download our compiled printable sheet option, save it to a thumb drive, and print it at a local digital photo kiosk using high-quality 4x6 photo paper standard settings.

cross_link_footer.title: Related Document Formats
cross_link_footer.text: Need an alternative size? View requirements for United States Visa dimensions or look up alternative global standard documentation formats.
